title: pelargonium × luculentum
intro: Pelargonium × luculentum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Geranium genus, native to South Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and improve mood.
